section1.title: What is a landing page?
section1.p1: A landing page is a single-page website created for one specific goal.
section1.p2: Simply put: it's a page that persuades a visitor to take one action - submit a request, buy a product, sign up, download, or register.
section1.p3: There's nothing extra on a landing page.

section2.title: What are landing pages used for?
section2.footer: If you need results right now - a landing page is the most effective format.

section3.title: What do you get?
items: A thoughtful structure that drives conversions

landingFaq.q: How is a landing page different from a regular website?
landingFaq.a: A landing page is a single-page site with one clear goal: a lead, purchase, or sign-up. A regular site can have many pages and sections; a landing page focuses on one action.
On average, 7 to 14 days. The timeline depends on design complexity, number of sections, and extra features.

landingFaq.q: Is a landing page right for my business?
landingFaq.a: If you need to test an idea quickly, run ads, or increase leads - a landing page is a great fit.
Yes. We can create a custom design or use an optimized template when speed and budget matter.

landingFaq.q: Will the landing page work on mobile?
landingFaq.a: Yes. All our landing pages are fully responsive and work correctly on smartphones and tablets.

landingFaq.q: Can you add payment to the site?
landingFaq.a: Yes. We integrate online payment, CRM, lead forms, and other integrations you need.
Yes. We can write conversion-focused copy for your landing page.

landingFaq.q: Can the landing page be updated later?
landingFaq.a: Of course. You can add new sections, change content, or grow it into a full website.

landingFaq.q: Do you set up analytics and ads?
landingFaq.a: Yes. We set up analytics and prepare the landing page for ad campaigns.

landingFaq.q: How much does a landing page cost?
landingFaq.a: Cost depends on scope, design, and features. You can get an estimate in our calculator in about a minute.

landing.label: Landing page (one-page site)
pros: Great for one product or service
cons: Suited for one main goal only
Not suitable for large product catalogs

multipage.label: Multi-page website
cons: Longer and more expensive to build
Less focus on a single action

landingCalculator.title: Landing page cost calculator

landingCalculator.designIndividualTooltip: With detailed elaboration of all requirements
